mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_owner_info_modify_application (community_id, owner_id, modify_type, old_value, new_value, apply_reason, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{ownerId}, #{modifyType}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, #{applyReason}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, community_id, owner_id, modify_type, old_value, new_value, apply_reason, status, reject_reason, audit_admin_id, audit_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time FROM sys_owner_info_modify_application WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, community_id, owner_id, modify_type, old_value, new_value, apply_reason, status, reject_reason, audit_admin_id, audit_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time FROM sys_owner_info_modify_application WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_owner_info_modify_application SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, audit_admin_id = #{auditAdminId}, audit_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
